task_description: Expand the Music Search & Discovery app into a comprehensive music discovery platform with: enhanced UI (dark/light theme, glassmorphism, skeleton loaders, mini player), advanced search (autocomplete, voice search, additional filters, keyboard shortcuts), rich content pages (artist profiles with Last.fm integration, album details with track listings, enriched song details with recommendations), music discovery (trending, new releases, genre browsing, infinite scroll), and personalization (favorite artists/albums, playlists, recently played, dashboard analytics, share features, enhanced error handling).

verification.summary: bun run build passes with all 9 routes (/, /_not-found, /album/[id], /artist/[id], /dashboard, /discover, /favorites, /playlists, /track/[id]). bun run lint passes with zero errors. No test framework installed in project so test_quality is skipped. No Dockerfile present so docker_build is skipped.
